changeSet.author: englishmemory
changeSet.sql: CREATE SEQUENCE SEQ_SENTENCE_PRACTICES START WITH 1 INCREMENT BY 1 NOCACHE NOCYCLE

changeSet.author: englishmemory
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE SENTENCE_PRACTICES ( ID NUMBER NOT NULL, USER_ID NUMBER NOT NULL, VOCABULARY_WORD_ID NUMBER, STUDY_SESSION_ID NUMBER, ORIGINAL_SENTENCE CLOB NOT NULL, CORRECTED_SENTENCE CLOB, AI_FEEDBACK CLOB, GRAMMAR_EXPLANATION CLOB, SUGGESTED_SENTENCES CLOB, NEW_VOCABULARY_FOUND CLOB, SCORE NUMBER(3) DEFAULT 0, CREATED_AT TIMESTAMP DEFAULT SYSTIMESTAMP NOT NULL, UPDATED_AT TIMESTAMP DEFAULT SYSTIMESTAMP NOT NULL, ACTIVE NUMBER(1) DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT PK_SENTENCE_PRACTICES PRIMARY KEY (ID), CONSTRAINT FK_SENTENCE_USER FOREIGN KEY (USER_ID) REFERENCES USERS (ID), CONSTRAINT FK_SENTENCE_VOCAB FOREIGN KEY (VOCABULARY_WORD_ID) REFERENCES VOCABULARY_WORDS (ID), CONSTRAINT CK_SENTENCE_SCORE CHECK (SCORE BETWEEN 0 AND 100 OR SCORE IS NULL), CONSTRAINT CK_SENTENCE_ACTIVE CHECK (ACTIVE IN (0, 1)) )

changeSet.author: englishmemory
